name: kh-uaf
description: Pure Python agentic orchestration engine for Antigravity, Codex, Claude Code, and domain-general workflows. Features always-on FIRST front-door intake for non-trivial ordinary user requests before MEMORY.md lookup, target or sibling folder inspection, source reads, subagents, or other plugin work; automatic intake, front-door auto routing, packaged skills with usage references, minimal workflow examples, executable smoke checks, capability-based plugin composition, KH-native replacements for Superpowers-style worktree/TDD/debug/review/finish workflows, brainstorming handoff, large-work orchestration bundle evidence with application modes, development progress state, automatic workflow usability runtime, runtime token optimization evidence, active memory preflight, explicit cross-scope memory import, bounded prompt memory snapshots, pre-compaction memory flush, runtime memory candidate recording, session skill audits with per-skill acceptance output checks, session postmortem gates with user-stop override, interruption checkpoints with scoped resume memory, progress-to-Compound bridge, token optimizer provider policy, KH role command entrypoints, visible and host-native progress panels, session-start context restore, skill transition validation, Compound learning capture, 10-point advisory skill structure scoring, deterministic offline CLI smoke runs, KH-Bench Verified practical task evaluation with SIDE regression cases, practical release quality gating, domain profiles, work design artifacts, standard-template functional specification exports, metadata-only quality harnesses, operational skill quality validation, DAG-based role artifact waves, evidence-enforced gates, retention cleanup, asyncio bounded workers, Windows app bridge integration, multiprocessing sandboxing, work-level gzip snapshot rollback, and a CLI launcher.
author: KH UAF

skills.name: orchestrate
skills.description: Run the full agent workflow: domain design, artifact persistence, dispatch, parallel bounded task execution, validation, and optional webhook reporting.

skills.name: contracts
skills.description: Shared dataclass contracts for Codex, Antigravity, Claude Code, local adapters, domain profiles, work designs, and artifact manifests.

skills.name: domain-profiles
skills.description: Build domain-neutral DomainProfile and WorkDesign metadata for software, operations, analysis, design, and other workflow topics.

skills.name: always-on-front-door
skills.description: Host-visible bootstrap skill that must run KH front-door intake before MEMORY.md lookup, target or sibling folder inspection, source exploration, other skills/plugins, subagent dispatch, or verification work.

skills.name: automatic-intake-harness
skills.description: Run KH intake for non-trivial project work even when the user did not name KH, UAF, a skill, or a harness.

skills.name: plugin-composition-policy
skills.description: Choose direct, single-provider, hybrid, or clarify routing across dynamic plugins, tools, skills, connectors, and future capability providers without letting any provider self-force selection before it is delegated scope.

skills.name: plugin-composition
skills.description: Capability-based plugin composition broker that returns controller, assistants, ignored self-forcing providers, unavailable capabilities, and fallback policy.

skills.name: kh-front-door
skills.description: Executable KH intake router that resolves the current skill source, rejects stale plugin cache paths, classifies the request, composes the provider route, and returns selected skill evidence before source work starts.

skills.name: plugin-install-audit
skills.description: Audit Codex KH UAF marketplace descriptor ref, plugin source ref, installed cache versions, and source manifest versions without confusing marketplace main with plugin codex-runtime.

skills.name: brainstorming-harness
skills.description: Use KH UAF brainstorming for underspecified product, project, workflow, analysis, research, policy, process, document, specification, investment, operations, manufacturing, drawing, or design-direction requests before architecture, execution, deliverables, or implementation.

skills.name: compound-engineering-harness
skills.description: Use KH UAF Compound after review to capture reusable learning, scoped memory candidates, system updates, and regression checks.

skills.name: role-orchestrator
skills.description: Execute orchestration roles as dependency-ready asyncio DAG waves and record role WorkflowTaskResult metadata.

skills.name: artifact-manifest-store
skills.description: Persist work designs and domain design artifacts in project-scoped UAF runtime state and expose ArtifactManifest evidence for workflow gates.

skills.name: office-deliverable-export
skills.description: Route user-facing workflow deliverables by artifact type under the target project's docs folder, including standard-template software functional specification and development design outputs, documentation-grade general DOCX/XLSX outputs, conditional revision-managed manuals, analysis workbooks, and product-design SVG/DXF handoff files.

skills.name: quality-harnesses
skills.description: Evaluate deliverable template quality, artifact render structure, metadata-only traceability rows, and role execution audit evidence without writing harness-only files into project docs.

skills.name: resume-handoff
skills.description: Build resume-safe handoff snapshots from goal ledger, artifact manifest, and scoped memory context.

skills.name: skill-application-bundle
skills.description: Build and validate lightweight large-work skill status bundles with runtime, procedural, considered, and blocked application modes.

skills.name: development-progress
skills.description: Build, validate, read, and write `.kh/development/<run-id>/state/progress.json` for task-plan runs with RED/GREEN, review, fix, re-review, commit, next task, workspace, and token optimizer status.

skills.name: skill-transitions
skills.description: Validate that KH large-work skill handoffs do not stop at listed skills: memory candidates trigger memory-state, subagent review triggers token decision and role audit, and post-review work closes Compound or routes to distillation.

skills.name: workflow-usability-harness
skills.description: Expose KH progress-to-Compound automation, token optimizer provider policy, role command entrypoints, visible progress panels, and session-start context restore.

skills.name: workflow-usability-runtime
skills.description: Automatically attach session-start context, token provider policy, progress panel, progress.json, and Compound handoff artifacts to AgentLoop, app bridge, local workflow, and native host dispatch paths.

skills.name: progress-compound-bridge
skills.description: Convert `.kh/development/<run-id>/state/progress.json` into CompoundCapture, Compound handoff, memory candidates, skill candidates, scenario candidates, and docs/kh handoff markdown.

skills.name: token-optimizer-provider
skills.description: Resolve `token_optimizer_provider` policy as kh, rtk, hybrid, or passthrough with RTK optional and KH as the safe fallback.

skills.name: runtime-token-optimizer
skills.description: Attach quality-preserving token optimization records to WorkflowTaskResult command outputs and subagent transcripts, including RTK-style command-family savings statistics.

skills.name: runtime-memory-candidates
skills.description: Record Compound memory candidates into the scoped MemoryStore candidate log without promoting them to durable memory records.

skills.name: active-memory-preflight
skills.description: Run KH-scoped active memory recall before heavy work and write bounded MEMORY.md/USER.md prompt snapshots in the runtime memory directory.

skills.name: explicit-cross-scope-memory-import
skills.description: Read a user-named source project/chat memory as read-only external context and apply it to the current scope only after explicit approval, defaulting to memory candidates.

skills.name: pre-compaction-memory-flush
skills.description: Persist compact decisions, blockers, next actions, and verification state before host context compaction can erase them.

skills.name: memory-provider-policy
skills.description: Resolve local, external, hybrid, or passthrough memory provider policy with KH local scoped memory as the default fallback.

skills.name: role-command-entrypoints
skills.description: Provide concise KH role command entrypoints such as /kh:work, /kh:qa, /kh:ship, /kh:learn, and /kh:resume.

skills.name: progress-panel
skills.description: Render visible task-plan progress panels with task status, review status, token optimizer status, commit SHA, active task, and next task.

skills.name: host-progress-panel
skills.description: Build host-native progress panel JSON for Codex, Antigravity-style Agent Manager, CLI shells, and future hosts from KH development progress state.

skills.name: session-start-context
skills.description: Build next-session context by inspecting `.kh`, `docs/kh`, latest progress/Compound state, interruption checkpoints, scoped memory records, and scoped memory candidates.

skills.name: interruption-checkpoint
skills.description: Persist user-requested stop state to `.kh/development/<run-id>/state/interruption.json`, visible Markdown, and scoped durable resume memory.

skills.name: session-postmortem
skills.description: Analyze Codex session JSONL logs for token gates, active-goal completion mistakes, user-stop override failures, failed verification claims, review timeouts, secret exposure, subagent cleanup, and git integration status.

skills.name: session-skill-audit
skills.description: Audit Codex session JSONL logs against the full KH skill catalog, separating required, applied, inspected, mentioned, missing, and per-skill acceptance output evidence.

skills.name: windows-dev-server-runner
skills.description: Build Windows-safe Streamlit launch and health-check plans with normalized Path/PATH handling, redirected logs, and explicit visible/hidden window strategy.

skills.name: evidence-producers
skills.description: Normalize command, review, and QA outputs into GoalState evidence keys.

skills.name: gate-evaluators
skills.description: Focused spec, code-quality, QA, security, and release gate evaluators with structured evidence records.

skills.name: extension-registry
skills.description: Shared registry for pluggable dispatchers, LLM providers, skill harnesses, and host adapters.

skills.name: memory-state
skills.description: Resolve project and conversation scoped persistent memory namespaces.

skills.name: memory-store
skills.description: JSON/JSONL scoped persistent memory store with candidates, events, and cleanup policy.

skills.name: llm-router
skills.description: Built-in deterministic offline, OpenAI-compatible, and Anthropic routing with custom LLM provider registration.

skills.name: command-check-runner
skills.description: Run bounded local verification commands or named presets and convert subprocess results into evidence records.

skills.name: browser-qa-boundary
skills.description: Browser/QA check contracts, runner boundary, and JSON process sidecar adapter for injected browser adapters or future TypeScript sidecars.

skills.name: workflow-check-stage
skills.description: Typed workflow stage for command and Browser/QA check planning, execution, evidence aggregation, and success calculation.

skills.name: local-generation-adapters
skills.description: Deterministic and LLM-backed local code generation adapters behind LocalTaskRunner.

skills.name: antigravity-native-boundary
skills.description: Native Antigravity dispatch result contract with injected-adapter and JSON process sidecar boundaries.

skills.name: codex-thread-registry
skills.description: Read Codex desktop thread state for active/archived conversation memory cleanup when the local registry is available.

skills.name: windows-app-bridge
skills.description: App-first integration helper for Codex and Antigravity Windows hosts. Builds role-aware AdapterRequest metadata and dispatches without CLI parsing.

skills.name: skill-catalog
skills.description: Packaged UAF skill folder catalog. Add skills as skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md; external plugin folders are not runtime dependencies.

skills.name: skill-quality
skills.description: Audit packaged skill support files, SKILL.md wiring, smoke script execution, implementation target resolution, test evidence, and 10-point practical readiness thresholds before publishing.

skills.name: request-complexity-router
skills.description: Classify user requests as light, medium, heavy, high-risk, or ambiguous before choosing direct answer, skill/module, or role-DAG execution depth.

skills.name: scenario-evaluation-harness
skills.description: Run deterministic SIDE-style scenario evaluation across request routing, evidence requirements, gate decisions, and resume readiness.

skills.name: kh-bench-verified
skills.description: Run the fixed KH-Bench Verified practical task benchmark with clean workspaces, sealed external candidate task views, pre-validation, fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, artifact validators, and JSON scoring.

skills.name: practical-quality-gate
skills.description: Run the release gate that treats KH-Bench, SIDE regression, and E2E task results as the primary quality signal while using static skill quality as an advisory structure check.

skills.name: snapshot-state-harness
skills.description: Packaged UAF snapshot skill for project/chat-scoped work-level gzip checkpoint bundles, rollback, and .snapshots metadata protection.

skills.name: host-agent-orchestration
skills.description: Personal UAF host agent, subagent, permission, hook, and observability harness for Codex, Antigravity-style, Claude Code, and local runtimes.

skills.name: orchestration-role-graph
skills.description: Default UAF role graph covering CEO, advisor, architect, controller, implementer, reviewers, QA, security, and release roles.

skills.name: development-lifecycle-harness
skills.description: Personal UAF Plan, Work, Review, verification, branch-finishing, and Compound handoff workflow.

skills.name: domain-orchestration-harness
skills.description: UAF-native domain orchestration harness for mandatory work design, role decomposition, design artifacts, review, QA/QC, risk, policy, and final decision gates.

skills.name: subagent-review-pipeline
skills.description: UAF-native implementer, spec-reviewer, and code-quality-reviewer pipeline for independent subagent tasks.

skills.name: quality-gates-harness
skills.description: UAF-native TDD, systematic debugging, review, and evidence-before-completion gate definitions.

skills.name: sql-formatting-style-harness
skills.description: Verify SQL/T-SQL formatting output against the host-local sql-formatting style contract without replacing the host-local skill.

skills.name: worktree-isolation-harness
skills.description: KH-native workspace isolation policy for host worktrees, project-local .worktrees, isolated branches, and current-checkout exceptions.

skills.name: plan-execution-harness
skills.description: KH-native task-plan execution loop with progress.json, RED/GREEN, review, commit, and next-task handoff.

skills.name: systematic-debugging-harness
skills.description: KH-native bug diagnosis workflow for symptoms, reproduction, hypotheses, root cause, regression evidence, and verification.

skills.name: verification-before-completion-harness
skills.description: KH-native completion guard that requires fresh verification evidence before done, commit, push, PR-ready, release, or handoff claims.

skills.name: branch-finishing-harness
skills.description: KH-native branch finishing workflow for local-only, committed, pushed, PR-ready, merged, blocked, or cleanup-only decisions.

skills.name: deliverable-template-quality-harness
skills.description: UAF-native deliverable section and table-marker quality harness for generated user-facing artifacts.

skills.name: artifact-render-qa-harness
skills.description: UAF-native type-aware artifact readability and format-specific structural or sanity QA harness.

skills.name: traceability-matrix-harness
skills.description: UAF-native metadata-only requirements, deliverables, evidence, and gate traceability harness.

skills.name: role-execution-audit-harness
skills.description: UAF-native role DAG execution audit harness for role results, artifacts, and parallel wave evidence.

skills.name: command-output-harness
skills.description: Personal UAF command output filtering, grouping, truncation, deduplication, exit-code preservation, and savings tracking.

skills.name: command-hook-policy-harness
skills.description: UAF-native command rewrite, trust, integrity, permission precedence, and non-blocking hook policy harness.

skills.name: review-gate-harness
skills.description: UAF-native review gate harness for structured review workflow patterns.

skills.name: qa-gate-harness
skills.description: UAF-native QA gate harness for regression and verification workflow patterns.

skills.name: context-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native context save and restore harness for resumable workflow patterns.

skills.name: goal-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native goal state harness for objective tracking, completion criteria, and evidence-based closure.

skills.name: memory-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native scoped persistent memory harness for project/conversation memory, candidates, and cleanup policy.

skills.name: guard-policy-harness
skills.description: UAF-native guard policy harness for careful execution, edit boundary, and override workflow patterns.

skills.name: health-check-harness
skills.description: UAF-native health check harness for quality dashboard and release readiness workflow patterns.

skills.name: sandbox
skills.description: Safely execute untrusted Python code with AST filtering and multiprocessing-based timeout kill. Windows compatible.

skills.name: snapshot
skills.description: Commit and rollback file states using gzip-compressed snapshots. Provides 90%+ disk savings over plain-text backup.

skills.name: webhook-server
skills.description: Optional FastAPI webhook receiver for external host callbacks, using aiosqlite + WAL mode and auto log rotation.
